# AMO Career Toolkit

> An interactive career and research toolkit for Atomic, Molecular & Optical (AMO) physicists. Covers Rydberg atom gate fidelity, fluorescence imaging SNR, TOF thermometry, MOT design, laser locking, Zernike wavefront analysis, and quantum computing fundamentals — built by a Purdue Physics PhD researcher in the Hood Lab (ultracold atoms / optical tweezers).

**Live site:** https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/
**Author:** Saumitra Phatak — Physics PhD candidate, Purdue University, Hood Lab
**Tech stack:** Pure static HTML/CSS/Vanilla JS; Chart.js and KaTeX via CDN; no build tools
**Source:** https://github.com/saumitraphatak/amo-career

This site contains 13 interactive physics tools, a quantum computing industry guide, a 14-topic quantum fundamentals educational section, and reference material for laser cooling experiments. All math is rendered with KaTeX. There is no server — every page is a self-contained HTML file.

## Home

- [Home page](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/home.html): Landing page with overview of the AMO tools, learning section, and author information

## Research Tools

- [Atom Library](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/atom-library.html): Properties of 15 laser-coolable atoms — mass, D1/D2 wavelengths, linewidth Γ, saturation intensity I_sat, Doppler temperatures, and recoil scales; family tabs (alkali, alkaline-earth, rare-earth); US research groups per species
- [Lab Techniques](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/lab-techniques.html): 8 core AMO experimental techniques with deep-dive accordion sections — laser cooling, MOT loading, evaporative cooling, optical tweezers, fluorescence imaging, absorption imaging, RF spectroscopy, optical lattices
- [Rydberg Calculator](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/rydberg-calculator.html): Interactive calculator for Rydberg state properties vs principal quantum number n (30–120) — lifetime τ ∝ n³ with BBR correction, C₆ van der Waals coefficient ∝ n¹¹, blockade radius R_b = (C₆/ℏΩ)^(1/6), gate fidelity estimate; species: Rb87, Cs133, Yb171, Sr88
- [Imaging SNR Calculator](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/imaging-calculator.html): Single-atom fluorescence detection calculator — scattering rate R_sc, geometric collection efficiency η_geo = (1−√(1−NA²))/2, full noise model (EMCCD / sCMOS / ideal camera), SNR vs exposure time chart, detection fidelity via normal CDF, minimum exposure finder for SNR=10 and SNR=50; species: Rb87, Cs133, Li6/7, Na23, K39/40
- [TOF Thermometry](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/tof-calculator.html): Time-of-flight temperature extraction — ballistic expansion σ²(t) = σ₀² + (k_BT/m)t², linear regression from (t,σ) data table, phase-space density, BEC threshold (PSD ≥ 2.612), de Broglie wavelength, Doppler and recoil limit comparison; species: Rb85/87, Cs133, Li6/7, Na23, K39/40/41
- [MOT / Magnetic Trap Designer](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/mot-designer.html): Dual-section tool: (1) MOT parameters — damping α, spring constant κ, trap frequency ω_MOT, capture velocity vs detuning Δ/Γ and saturation s; (2) Ioffe-Pritchard magnetic trap — radial/axial frequencies ω_r, ω_z, trap depth U₀, evaporation parameter η = U₀/k_BT, Majorana loss warning; species: Rb87, Cs133, Na23, Li7, K39
- [Gate Fidelity Budget](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/fidelity-budget.html): Rydberg two-qubit gate error budget — 8 error sources (spontaneous emission, Doppler dephasing, laser phase noise, blockade leakage, SPAM, atom loss, B-field noise, Rabi inhomogeneity); color-coded fidelity meter; SOTA comparison vs Evered 2023 (99.5%), Muniz 2025 (99.72% post-selected / 99.40% raw), and approximate FTQC thresholds; species: Rb87, Cs133, Yb171, Sr88
- [Release-Recapture Simulator](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/release-recapture.html): Interactive tweezer thermometry simulation — recapture probability vs free-flight time for a known Gaussian trap; not a direct trap-frequency measurement
- [Lab Calculators](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/lab-calculators.html): Large multi-section suite — optics (beam waist, Rayleigh range, NA, fiber coupling, AOM shift, shot noise), atomic physics (single-recoil and scatter-heating scales, Doppler temperature, Zeeman shift, I_sat, de Broglie wavelength), trap physics (tweezer frequency, Lamb-Dicke parameter, cavity FSR/finesse), Clebsch-Gordan coefficients
- [Cooling Simulator](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/cooling-simulator.html): Doppler and Sisyphus cooling interactive animation — force vs velocity, momentum diffusion, sub-Doppler mechanisms
- [Laser Locking Guide](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/laser-locking.html): Saturated absorption spectroscopy, PDH (Pound-Drever-Hall) locking, and offset beat-note locking — error signal derivation, cavity finesse F = π√R/(1−R), cavity linewidth δν_cav = FSR/F, PDH optical chain
- [Zernike Polynomial Visualizer](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/zernike.html): Wavefront aberration analysis — OSA/ANSI Zernike polynomials Z_n^m(ρ,θ), interactive coefficient sliders (tip, tilt, defocus, astigmatism, coma, spherical), Strehl ratio, SLM phase pattern for LG modes
- [Polarimetry Explorer](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/polarimetry.html): Stokes parameter visualization, quarter-wave plate rotation analysis, Poincaré sphere, degree of polarization

## Quantum Computing

- [QC Industry Landscape](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/qc-landscape.html): Where AMO physics skills fit in the quantum computing industry — company profiles (IonQ, Quantinuum, IBM, Google, PsiQuantum, etc.), job roles, hardware platform comparison, career roadmaps for AMO physicists

## Learn Quantum

- [Bloch Sphere](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#bloch): Qubit state representation |ψ⟩ = cos(θ/2)|0⟩ + e^{iφ}sin(θ/2)|1⟩, interactive rotation, Mach-Zehnder interferometer unitary
- [Quantum Gates](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#gates): Hadamard, Pauli X/Y/Z, CNOT, T-gate — circuit diagrams and matrix representations
- [Superposition](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#superposition): Born rule, probability amplitudes, measurement collapse, interference
- [Measurement](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#measurement): Projective measurement, expectation values, no-cloning theorem
- [Entanglement](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#entanglement): Bell states (Φ⁺, Φ⁻, Ψ⁺, Ψ⁻), EPR paradox, CHSH inequality, quantum teleportation protocol
- [Rydberg Atoms](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#rydberg): n-scaling laws (τ ∝ n³, C₆ ∝ n¹¹, R_b ∝ n^(11/6)), dipole-dipole interaction V(R) = C₆/R⁶, blockade mechanism for quantum gates
- [Two-Qubit Gates](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#twoqubit): CZ gate, CNOT from CZ, Rydberg blockade gate protocol, Mølmer-Sørensen gate for trapped ions
- [Rabi Oscillations](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#rabi): Rabi frequency Ω, generalized Rabi frequency Ω' = √(Ω²+Δ²), dressed states, Bloch vector precession, rotating frame
- [Decoherence](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#decoherence): T₁ (longitudinal / energy relaxation), T₂ (transverse / phase), T₂* (inhomogeneous dephasing), spin echo, dynamical decoupling
- [Hyperfine Qubits](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#hyperfine): Hyperfine Hamiltonian H_hf = A_hf·I·J, clock states (m_F=0), Zeeman shift, ⁸⁷Rb |F=1,m_F=−1⟩↔|F=2,m_F=+1⟩ and ¹³³Cs qubit transitions
- [Optical Pumping](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#optical-pumping): σ⁺ selection rules Δm_F=+1, F=1 population redistribution to stretch state m_F=+1, interactive 3-sublevel simulation, EIT/CPT dark states, clock-state preparation
- [Quantum Error Correction](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#qec): 3-qubit bit-flip code, Shor 9-qubit code, surface code, threshold theorem (~1% error threshold for fault-tolerance)
- [Quantum Algorithms](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#algorithms): Deutsch-Jozsa (oracle query), Grover's search O(√N), Shor's factoring O((log N)³), VQE for chemistry
- [Analog Quantum Simulation](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/pages/learn-quantum.html#analog-sim): Bose-Hubbard model, transverse-field Ising, BEC-BCS crossover, quantum phase transitions

## Optional

- [Site map](https://saumitraphatak.github.io/amo-career/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap listing all pages
